utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six categories. Each is fully specified: (1) property includes address, type, and price; (2) financing includes down payment, mortgage principal, interest rate, amortization period, and extra costs; (3) legal_services includes package and cost; (4) moving_services includes description and cost; (5) setup_services includes utility setup cost and average monthly utilities; (6) total_budget includes purchase price and initial cash outlay. All items are present and contain the necessary details.
